allow:
Bash(git tag -a v0.1.0 -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 1 complete: Playable two-player Kings and Quadraphages game

Features:
- 9x9 game board with accurate rule enforcement
- Two-player pass-and-play mode
- Valid move highlighting for Kings (green cells)
- Quadraphage placement with hover highlighting
- Supply tracking (30 Quadraphages per player)
- Win detection when King is trapped (red pulse animation)
- Move history panel with chess-style notation
- Last move highlight (orange border)
- New Game reset functionality
- How to Play modal with rules explanation
- Responsive design for mobile/tablet
- Keyboard accessibility support
- Invalid move shake animation feedback
EOF
)")
